comments.author: @sebentilezanini1085
comments.text:
I love You Tubers who capture the beauty of my forefathers land...the knowledge, the wisdom and respect for others was shaped in this country.

I have carried it with me to part of Africa, Europe and Asia.

I always say to those who ask where I am from "if you want peace, beautiful landscapes and warm hospitality" plan a trip there❤❤🇸🇿🇸🇿🇸🇿

Today...22nd July is King Sobhuza's birthday...

Whereever I am, I am ambassador ....

Cologne, Germany🇩🇪🇸🇿

Correction: umgqusho is actually a Xhosa dish that we have grown to love. Otherwise we eat beans.

Can I do voice overs for you?😊😊😊

comments.author: @GlobeExperiences2026
comments.text: Eswatini is such a unique and deeply fascinating nation! 🇸🇿 This 4K travel documentary offers an eye-opening look at what living in Eswatini is truly like under Africa's last absolute monarchy. The way the Swazi people preserve their rich culture, royal traditions, and heritage while adapting to modern life is amazing to see. From the stunning mountain landscapes to the warmth of the local community, this video captures the true essence of Swaziland beyond the headlines. Outstanding cinematography!
